changelog:
Dropdowns no longer clipped inside cards, tables and modals (project-wide)
Number fields select the 0 on focus so typing replaces it; mouse wheel no longer edits quantities
Fixed frozen timestamps that gave every payment, stock move and activity log the same date
Recovered real dates for 53 payments and 70 stock moves from their source documents
Units of Measure rebuilt on a per-unit ratio: conversions are derived, exact, and cannot contradict each other
Editing a unit now takes effect immediately; cross-category conversions are refused instead of silently wrong
Goods receipt refuses a purchase/stock unit pair it cannot convert, instead of corrupting stock
Product form explains the stock/purchase unit pairing and warns when a stock unit is missing
